data.title: FTX to Start Next Creditor Payout in September Following Court Approval
data.description:

data.title: BlackRock’s ETHA becomes third-fastest ETF to $10B
data.description:
BlackRock’s U. S. -listed Ethereum ETF is now among the fastest-growing funds in history. Bloomberg Senior ETF analyst, Eric Balchunas disclosed this, noting that BlackRock iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA) has passed $10 billion in assets. According to Balchunas, ETHA is the third-fastest ETF to hit the $10 billion mark, coming behind two spot Bitcoin ETFs, BlackRock IBIT […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-etha-third-fastest-to-10b/

data.title: Analyst Unveils Massive Downside Targets for Top Ethereum Rival Solana, Updates Outlook on Bitcoin and Ethena
data.description:
An analyst who accurately called the 2022 crypto collapse believes that one Ethereum (ETH) rival is on the verge of a deep correction. Pseudonymous analyst Capo tells his 129,129 subscribers on his Telegram channel that Solana (SOL) is facing resistance at the $200 level and may decline more than 68% from its current value.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/24/analyst-unveils-massive-downside-targets-for-top-ethereum-rival-solana-updates-outlook-on-bitcoin-and-ethena/

data.title: Strategy expands preferred stock offering to $2B amid Bitcoin-fueled rally — Report
data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/strategy-raises-2b-preferred-stock-bitcoin-rally?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Strategy upsizes preferred ‘Stretch’ stock offering to $2 billion to buy more bitcoin
data.description:
Strategy expanded its Stretch preferred sale to $2 billion and will price shares at $90, raising fresh capital to grow its 607,770 bitcoin treasury.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/364199/strategy-upsizes-stretch-stock-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: BitMine Immersion aims to stake 5% of Ethereum’s supply as holdings exceed $2 billion
data.description:
BitMine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) has strengthened its position as Ethereum’s largest publicly traded holder, with its total ETH portfolio now valued at over $2 billion. In a disclosure on July 24, the company announced that it currently holds 566,776 ETH, acquired at an average price of $3,643 per token.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bitmine-immersion-aims-to-stake-5-of-ethereums-supply-as-holdings-exceed-2-billion/

data.title: Ethereum network hits all-time high in gas usage
data.description:
The Ethereum network shows unprecedented demand, recently marking a new record of daily gas used. The metric shows peak on-chain activity, while individual transactions remain relatively cheap. Activity picked up in the past few days, with daily gas use rising to a record level. The metric reveals Ethereum is key to on-chain activity, and that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-network-all-time-high-gas-usage/

data.title: Trading platform WOO X pauses withdrawals after $14M breach
data.description:
